description: Style NoteCrafted from the softest fabric and styled with high fashion oomph, this brief from bw!tch contours your every curve and shapes you to give you an effortlessly curvy look in your body-hugging outfits. Now that's something worth investing in!Product DetailsWhite briefs with yellow lace styling at the front waistbandElasticated waistband and leg holes (high cut)Material and CareBlended fabricHand wash, drip dry in shadeDo not wring, iron, bleachWash dark colours separately
